originalAlarm.description: Value stored to '__x_4' during its initialization is never read

sanitizedDescription: Value stored to 'x' during its initialization is never read
reasoning: x = *inode at L8 in 7acf6cd80b2.c is marked // ERROR (7) — a VBDB-known dead store. x is assigned from the potentially-null inode pointer and is never read afterwards. PC = CONFIG_DEVPTS_MULTIPLE_INSTANCES correctly captures when this ifdef block is active. No library macros.
